title: FlashLightTLG
description: FlashLiteTLG - built-in flashlight in the player. Created for the FreshMeat studio
body:
# FlashLightTLG

A FreshMeat Studio mod that adds a built-in, customizable flashlight.

## Features
- Toggle with the [F] key (rebindable)
- Adjustable size, brightness, and beam shape
- Custom sound effects
- Works in all dimensions
- Low performance impact

## Commands
/flashlight - Open settings menu
/flashlight size <1-5> - Change beam size
/flashlight mode <static/dynamic> - Toggle beam style
/flashlight sound <on/off> - Toggle sound effects

## Configuration
All settings can be configured via:
1. In-game commands
2. Config file (server-side)
3. Client settings (per-player)

## Requirements
- Fabric
- Minecraft 1.20.1
